name: ASUS TUF GAMING X870-PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4
shortName: ASUS TUF GAMING X870-PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: Robust TUF GAMING ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with PCIe 5.0, multiple M.2 slots, and WiFi 7.
